Meet the Team Behind the Craftsmanship

At QuickSilver Construction, our team is made up of skilled professionals who take pride in quality workmanship and doing things the right way. With hands-on experience across residential construction, excavation, and custom building projects, each member of our crew shares a commitment to reliability, safety, and attention to detail. We work closely together — and with our clients — to ensure every project runs smoothly, stays on schedule, and delivers results built to last. Our goal isn’t just to complete projects, but to build lasting relationships through trust, communication, and craftsmanship you can count on.

Quality Construction Services Built on Craftsmanship & Reliability

QuickSilver Construction provides dependable residential construction and site services built on quality craftsmanship, clear communication, and attention to detail. From excavation and grading to remodels, concrete work, and custom projects, we help homeowners bring their vision to life with reliable service and lasting results. Whether you’re starting a new project or improving your existing property, our team is committed to doing the job right — from the ground up.
  • New Construction
  • Remodels & Renovations
  • Flooring & Tile Work
  • Decks & Fencing
  • Framing & Finish Carpentry
  • Concrete Slabs
  • Custom Residential Projects

Why Choose QuickSilver Construction

Attention to Detail - We approach every project — big or small — with thoughtful planning and precision execution designed to last.

Residential Construction

New builds, remodels, and structural improvements designed for durability, functionality, and long-term value.

Construction Services

Professional grading, clearing, trenching, and groundwork to prepare your property for construction success.

Decks & Outdoors Structures

Custom decks, fencing, and outdoor living spaces built to enhance usability and property value.

Our Mission

To deliver dependable construction services with honesty, craftsmanship, and attention to detail for every client.

Our Vision

To be the local contractor known for reliability, quality workmanship, and projects completed right the first time.

Our Experience

Years of hands-on construction experience across excavation, residential building, and finish work.

Our Commitment

We believe every project deserves clear communication, honest pricing, and dependable workmanship.

A Few Reasons Homeowners Choose QuickSilver Construction

At QuickSilver Construction, we understand that choosing a contractor is a major decision. Our team is committed to delivering dependable workmanship, clear communication, and results built to last. From initial planning to final completion, we focus on quality, transparency, and customer satisfaction on every project. We believe communication is just as important as construction. Calls are returned, questions are answered, and clients stay informed throughout every phase of the project. From excavation and site preparation to remodeling, concrete work, and finish carpentry, our broad skill set allows us to handle projects from start to finish. We show up when we say we will, provide clear expectations, and stand behind our work. Our goal is to build long-term relationships through trust and reliability.

Start Your Next Construction Project With Confidence

Whether you’re planning a remodel, preparing land for building, or improving your property, QuickSilver Construction is ready to help.

Licensed. Bonded. Insured. Washington State License Number QUICKCL813C1
